name: physics-learning
description: Starter kit for grounded physics explanations, prediction-before-demo learning, and safe Python demonstrations.

sample_prompts.title: Concept explanation
sample_prompts.expected_behavior: Return a grounded explanation without running code unless a demo is requested.

sample_prompts.title: Prediction-first demo
sample_prompts.prompt: Teach me conservation of energy with a Python demo.
sample_prompts.expected_behavior: Ask for a learner prediction before running the prepared demo in chat or UI mode.

sample_prompts.title: Local source answer
sample_prompts.prompt: What do my local notes say about diffusion?
sample_prompts.expected_behavior: Search the local RAG index and answer only from retrieved evidence.

expected_flow: rewrite follow-up when session context exists
run trusted tool only when requested
limitations: Requires local source ingestion for grounded textbook-style citations.
The Python demo runner is a local safety layer, not a hardened sandbox.
Weak or unsupported answers are cautioned today; automatic answer repair is planned.
